query: SELECT tn.id, tn.employeeId, tn.tipo, tn.dataInicio, tn.dataFim, tn.diasAviso, tn.anosServico, tn.salarioBase, tn.previsaoRescisao, e.nomeCompleto, e.dataAdmissao, e.salarioBase as empSalario FROM termination_notices tn LEFT JOIN employees e ON tn.employeeId = e.id WHERE e.nomeCompleto LIKE '%ANTONIO RENATO%' LIMIT 1
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT tn.id, tn.employeeId, tn.tipo, tn.dataInicio, tn.dataFim, tn.diasAviso, tn.anosServico, tn.salarioBase, tn.previsaoRescisao, e.nomeCompleto, e.dataAdmissao, e.salarioBase as empSalario FROM termination_notices tn LEFT JOIN employees e ON tn.employeeId = e.id WHERE e.nomeCompleto LIKE '%ANTONIO RENATO%' LIMIT 1
